content.text:
I'll help you with those smart home controls right away.

<tool_call>tool: lights_off</tool_call>

<tool_call>tool: lock_doors</tool_call>

<tool_call>tool: set_thermostat(68)</tool_call>

I've executed all three commands:
1. Turned off all the lights
2. Locked all the doors
3. Set the thermostat to 68°F

Your home is now secured with lights off, doors locked, and the temperature set to a comfortable 68 degrees.

prompt: Turn off all lights, lock the doors, and set thermostat to 68F
